brenna.name: Brenna
brenna.title: Guildmaster
brenna.description: Hard-eyed and careful. Has sent more adventurers to their deaths than she will ever admit.

tomas.name: Tomas
tomas.title: Innkeeper of the Whispering Hollow
tomas.description: Polite to a fault. Remembers every guest who never came down for breakfast.

vira.name: Vira
vira.title: Merchant
vira.description: Prices fair, weights honest, smile unreadable.

orric.name: Orric
orric.title: Forester of Greenhollow
orric.description: Older than the guild that sends people past his door. Keeps an axe across his knees and a silence in his answers.

kael.name: Kael
kael.title: Blacksmith
kael.description: Arms like oak roots. Speaks little, hammers much. The anvil answers for him.

hermit.name: The Hermit
hermit.title: Marsh Dweller
hermit.description: Thin as a reed and twice as patient. Lives where no one else would choose to.

veyrin.name: Veyrin
veyrin.title: Elven Scholar
veyrin.description: Pale, thin, steady-handed. His eyes have the look of someone who has read too much and slept too little.

nessa.name: Nessa
nessa.title: Dockmaster
nessa.description: Practical, hard-jawed, unafraid. Runs Duskmere the way a captain runs a ship in bad water.

torben.name: Torben
torben.title: Fishmonger
torben.description: Broad-shouldered, stinking of brine, cheerful in the way of men who refuse to think about what frightens them.

mira.name: Mira
mira.title: Thief
mira.description: Quick hands, quicker feet. Thin as a reed and twice as hard to catch.

hesta.name: Hesta
hesta.title: Deserter
hesta.description: Thin in the cheeks, threadbare at the cuffs. The guild crest on her sleeve has been picked at with a knife and never sewn back.

halden.name: Halden
halden.title: Fisherman of Duskmere
halden.description: Hands raw from line-work. Eyes red. He has the look of a man who has run out of weather to blame.
